title: Install NotebookLM CLI & Official OpenCode Skill
summary: Install the official notebooklm-mcp-cli package, verify both bundled executables and the actual OpenCode user skill path on this machine, then deploy the official skill with a safe rollback path from the legacy custom-built skill.
keyOutcomes: nlm v0.5.22 and notebooklm-mcp executables installed and verified
Official OpenCode skill (nlm-skill) installed in skills/ directory at user level
Legacy custom skill preserved (notebooklm-legacy) with rollback path
Auth pending: user needs to run nlm login
risks: pip install may require --user flag or PATH troubleshooting
OpenCode may use a different skill discovery path than assumed
Old custom skill path may conflict with official skill placement
Authentication requires Chrome and user interaction
deliverables: Official OpenCode skill installed and verified at user level
Legacy skill archive and rollback note
validationCriteria: Exact version and executable paths are recorded
nlm doctor confirms installation health with expected pre-auth status documented
Official skill SKILL.md exists in the actual OpenCode user discovery directory
Old custom skill is archived only after successful official skill verification
